# Emperor Spices Pvt Ltd

> Premium Indian green cardamom exporter based in Bodinayakanur, Tamil Nadu, India — the heart of India's cardamom-growing belt. AGMARK certified export grades (AGEB, AGB, AGS), FSSAI licensed, ISO 22000:2018 and HACCP compliant, exporting to 40+ countries across the Middle East, Europe, the Americas, Asia and Africa.

Emperor Spices supplies whole green cardamom pods, cardamom seeds and cardamom powder in bulk to importers, wholesalers, food processors and HORECA buyers. Minimum order quantity is 500kg for bulk export (250kg for private label). Samples of 100g-500g with a Certificate of Analysis are available. Payment terms include LC (Letter of Credit) and CAD (Cash Against Documents).

Contact: +91 97900 05649 | Bodinayakanur 625513, Theni District, Tamil Nadu, India

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://emperorspices.com/): Company overview, certifications, grades and global reach
- [Products & Grades](https://emperorspices.com/products): AGEB (8mm+), AGB (7-8mm), AGS (6-7mm) specifications — size, oil content, moisture, color
- [Export & Wholesale](https://emperorspices.com/export): Bulk supply, packaging options (jute, PP woven, vacuum pouches, cartons), shipping markets
- [Product Specifications (machine-readable)](https://emperorspices.com/products.md): Full grade/spec/packaging/MOQ data in plain markdown
- [Knowledge Hub](https://emperorspices.com/knowledge): Guides on cardamom grades, quality selection, recipes and wellness
- [Contact](https://emperorspices.com/contact): Sample requests and export quotes

## Facts

- Founded in Bodinayakanur, known as the "Cardamom City" of India
- Export grades follow Indian AGMARK standards: AGEB (Extra Bold, 8mm+, 7-8% oil), AGB (Bold, 7-8mm, 6-7% oil), AGS (Small, 6-7mm, 5-6% oil)
- Certifications: FSSAI, ISO 22000:2018, HACCP, APEDA registration, Spices Board of India, IEC Code
- Active markets: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain, UK, Germany, France, Netherlands, USA, Canada, Japan, Singapore, Malaysia, South Africa and more
